dict.string: en
Runnit
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
LaunchScreen
Main
UIStatusBarStyleLightContent
Runnit uses your location to track runs, rides, and workouts in real-time.
Runnit needs background location access to continue tracking your activity when you switch apps mid-run.
Runnit needs background location access to continue tracking your activity when you switch apps mid-run.
Runnit uses your camera to capture and share workout moments.
Runnit can access your photo library to choose images for workout moments.
Runnit can save your workout photos to your photo library.
Runnit can record voice notes during your workouts.
Runnit can find your contacts who are also on Runnit so you can train together.
Runnit uses motion data to track your step cadence and automatically detect your activity type.
Runnit connects to Bluetooth heart rate monitors and fitness sensors during workouts.
Runnit connects to Bluetooth heart rate monitors and fitness sensors during workouts.
